creator: egypcio@FreeBSD.org
text:
there's no brazilian portuguese version of the "Obtaining FreeBSD" handbook appendix chapter (doc/pt_BR.ISO8859-1/books/handbook/mirrors.html) available to people who needs to read it in your native language.

Fix: 

checkout/export the brazilian portuguese freebsd doc. project subversion repository content to get the translated files (chapter.xml, mirrors-master.xsl and mirros.xml):

bash$ REPO="http://freebsd-doc-br.googlecode.com/svn/trunk"
bash$ svn export $REPO/docs/pt_BR.ISO8859-1/books/handbook/mirrors/chapter.xml
bash$ svn export $REPO/docs/share/xml/mirrors.xml
bash$ svn export $REPO/docs/share/xml/mirrors-master.xsl

already compiled pt_BR version of this chapter?
http://doc.fug.com.br/~egypcio/handbook/mirrors.html
How-To-Repeat: en_US? http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/handbook/mirrors.html
pt_BR? http://www.freebsd.org/doc/pt_BR.ISO8859-1/books/handbook/mirrors.html
